editor.label: Aim
editor.description: Activate or deactivate the aim

editor.label: Allow upload
editor.description: Allow or disallow tags to be uploaded

editor.label: Talk beween teams
editor.description: Allow or disallow talking between teams.

editor.label: Auto kick
editor.description: If enabled, the server will automatically kick team killers and idle players.

editor.label: Auto team balance
editor.description: If enabled, the server will always make sure that teams are balanced and that there is no advantaged team.

editor.label: C4 timer:
editor.description: Specifies, in seconds, after how much time the C4 bomb will blow up.

editor.label: Chat time:
editor.description: Time between end of map and mapchange.

editor.label: Allow cheats
editor.description: Allow or disallow cheats.

editor.label: Contact:
editor.description: Contact e-mail for this server.

editor.label: Decal frequency:
editor.description: Sets how frequently players can display their logo.

editor.label: Fall damage
editor.description: Enable or disable the damage when a player falls.

editor.label: Allow flashlight
editor.description: Let's you allow or disallow the use of the flashlight by pressing the F button.

editor.label: Enable footsteps
editor.description: Enable or disable footstep sounds.

items.text: Observer can spectate anyone, any mode
Observer can only spectate his own team
Observer can't spectate anyone and he'll only see his dead body

editor.label: Chase cam:
editor.description: Enable or disable team-only mode.

editor.label: Freeze time:
editor.description: Specifies the freeze time at beginning of round, in seconds.

editor.label: Friendly fire
editor.description: Enable or disable friendly fire (teammates cause damage to other teammates).

editor.label: Hostage penalty:
editor.description: Specifies how many hostages can be killed before players are kicked from the server. 0 allows players to kill an unlimited number of hostages.

editor.label: Limit teams:
editor.description: Sets how many players a team can have over the opposite team.

editor.label: Enabled
editor.description: Enable or disable logging.

editor.label: Log detail:
editor.description: Sets the level of detail for logging attacks.

editor.label: Log messages
editor.description: Enable or disable logging conversations

editor.label: Max rate:
editor.description: Sets the maximum data rate allowed on a server.

editor.label: Max speed:
editor.description: sets the maximum player speed for all clients.

editor.label: Min rate:
editor.description: Sets the minimum data rate allowed on a server.

editor.label: Pausable
editor.description: Allow the game to be paused.

editor.label: Allow HLTV proxy servers
editor.description: Allow allow HLTV proxy servers to connect to your server.

editor.label: Region:
editor.description: The region where this server is located.

editor.label: Restart round:
editor.description: The game is restarted after this number of seconds.

editor.label: Round time:
editor.description: Duration of each round in minutes.

editor.label: Allow spectators
editor.description: Allow or disallow spectators on this server.

editor.label: Start money:
editor.description: The amount of money each player starts with.

editor.label: Time limit:
editor.description: Sets the time in minutes between map changes.

editor.label: Punish teamkill
editor.description: Kill a player next round if he Teamkilled someone.

editor.label: Enable voice
editor.description: Set whether clients can use voice chat on your server.

editor.label: Server Config:
editor.description: The name of the configuration file to execute when the game server is started.

editor.description: Disables Valve Anti-Cheat technology.

configFiles.template:
; Users configuration file
; File location: $moddir/addons/amxmodx/configs/users.ini

; Line starting with ; is a comment

; Access flags:
; a - immunity (can't be kicked/baned/slayed/slaped and affected by other commmands)
; b - reservation (can join on reserved slots)
; c - amx_kick command
; d - amx_ban and amx_unban commands
; e - amx_slay and amx_slap commands
; f - amx_map command
; g - amx_cvar command (not all cvars will be available)
; h - amx_cfg command
; i - amx_chat and other chat commands
; j - amx_vote and other vote commands
; k - access to sv_password cvar (by amx_cvar command)
; l - access to amx_rcon command and rcon_password cvar (by amx_cvar command)
; m - custom level A (for additional plugins)
; n - custom level B
; o - custom level C
; p - custom level D
; q - custom level E
; r - custom level F
; s - custom level G
; t - custom level H
; u - menu access
; z - user (no admin)

; Account flags:
; a - disconnect player on invalid password
; b - clan tag
; c - this is steamid/wonid
; d - this is ip
; e - password is not checked (only name/ip/steamid needed)
; k - name or tag is case sensitive.  eg: if you set it so the name "Ham"
;     is protected and case sensitive (flags "k" only), then anybody
;     can use the names "haM", "HAM", "ham", etc, but not "Ham"

; Password:
; Add to your autoexec.cfg: setinfo _pw "<password>"
; Change _pw to the value of amx_password_field

; Format of admin account:
; <name|ip|steamid> <password> <access flags> <account flags>

; Examples of admin accounts:
; "STEAM_0:0:123456" "" "abcdefghijklmnopqrstu" "ce"
; "123.45.67.89" "" "abcdefghijklmnopqrstu" "de"
; "My Name" "my_password" "abcdefghijklmnopqrstu" "a"

${AMXAdmins}

configFiles.description: This is necessary for plugins that need to have settings specified prior to early API routines like ServerActivate, since autoexec.cfg is read too early and server.cfg is read to late.

editor.description: Disables Valve Anti-Cheat technology.

editor.description: Sets the level of detail for logging attacks.

script.name: Download correctly (Linux)
script.code:
# This downloads the files correctly (according to https://forums.alliedmods.net/showthread.php?p=2519238)
${TCAdminFolder}/Monitor/Tools/SteamCmd/steamcmd.sh +login anonymous +force_install_dir ${ThisService_RootDirectory} +app_update 90 validate +quit
${TCAdminFolder}/Monitor/Tools/SteamCmd/steamcmd.sh +login anonymous +force_install_dir ${ThisService_RootDirectory} +app_update 70 validate +quit
${TCAdminFolder}/Monitor/Tools/SteamCmd/steamcmd.sh +login anonymous +force_install_dir ${ThisService_RootDirectory} +app_update 10 validate +quit
${TCAdminFolder}/Monitor/Tools/SteamCmd/steamcmd.sh +login anonymous +force_install_dir ${ThisService_RootDirectory} +app_update 90 validate +quit

script.description: Delete qconsole.log before starting the service (Linux)

mods.name: Metamod 1.20
mods.comments: Metamod is a plugin/DLL manager that sits between the Half-Life Engine and an HL Game mod, allowing the dynamic loading/unloading of mod-like DLL plugins to add functionality to the HL server or game mod.

mods.name: AMX Mod X 1.8.2 - base
mods.comments: AMX Mod X is a versatile Half-Life metamod plugin which is targetted toward server administration.

mods.name: AMX Mod X 1.8.2 - cstrike
mods.comments: AMX Mod Addon pack for Counter-Strike
